message:
feat(freeze): Convert final operations and remove duplicates

Converted final operations (3 ops):
- plus: Unary plus operator (ToNumber), currently no-op
- return: Return value from stack using POP
- return_undef: Return JS_UNDEFINED without popping

Cleanup:
- Removed duplicate array operation handlers (get_array_el, get_array_el2, put_array_el, get_length)
- These were already converted earlier in lines 2501-2546

All operations now use proper Zig syntax:
- return with POP: { sp -= 1; const val = stack[@intCast(sp)]; val; }
- return_undef with qjs.JS_UNDEFINED constant
- Both use FROZEN_EXIT_STACK() macro for cleanup

Result: ALL comptime-generated handlers converted to explicit Zig support!
No more "try self.write(comptime handlers.generateCode...)" in SSA codegen.
